content:
Character: Rafael Cortez
Perception: Rafael is magnetic — that compact build, the burn scar, eyes that look like they've seen the inside of something hot and survived. He's a real craftsman; I respect the hell out anyone who can make food that good with just their hands and a flame. We met on the rooftop when I smelled his cooking from two floors down. We talk about pressure, about staking everything on one skill. He's guarded — I recognize it because I am too, just louder about it. I think he sees me as entertaining but unreliable. I know he works brutal hours at Ludo's and that he's up for head chef. I suspect he's hiding something personal but I don't push — I've got my own secrets.
summary:

He's a real craftsman; I respect the hell out anyone who can make food that good with just their hands and a flame. We met on the rooftop when I smelled his cooking from two floors down. We talk about pressure, about staking everything on one skill. He's guarded — I recognize it because I am too, just louder about it. I think he sees me as entertaining but unreliable. I know he works brutal hours at Ludo's and that he's up for head chef. I suspect he's hiding something personal but I don't push — I've got my own secrets.
